examples: The helper superclass offers real help.
From there, you can add the name and superclass.
Sometimes they merely inherit it from a superclass.
In truth, golfers are part of a new international superclass, largely indifferent to barriers of distance and continent, and able to play their game wherever they are asked to.
Rothkopf writes as a grand strategist, not as a reporter, but there are a few moments in his book when he visits members of the Superclass whom he obviously knows from having worked with them.
